task: Check the specifications of the best-selling HP FHD laptop with 16 GB RAM and core i7 running on Windows 11.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by searching Best Buy, sorting results by Best Selling, and opening the top organic HP laptop matching the requested criteria. Evidence on the product page shows: HP 17.3" Full HD Laptop, Intel Core i7-1355U, 16GB Memory, 1TB SSD, and in the specs table the Compatibility section lists Operating System: Windows 11 Home. The page also shows Full HD 1920 x 1080 display and other specs. The final summary is supported by the snapshots, including rating/review count and most listed specifications. Although the user asked to 'check the specifications' rather than explicitly identify the exact best-seller methodology, the agent reasonably used Best Selling sort and reported the specs of the top matching product.
final_result_response:
I sorted Best Buy results by **Best Selling** and checked the top non-sponsored matching HP FHD laptop.

**Product:** HP 17.3" Full HD Laptop  
**Model:** 17-cn3327dx  
**SKU:** 6636605  
**Price shown:** $799.99

**Key specs:**
- **OS:** Windows 11 Home
- **Processor:** Intel 13th Gen Core i7-1355U, 10-core, up to 5.0 GHz
- **RAM:** 16GB DDR4, 3200 MHz
- **Storage:** 1TB SSD, PCIe
- **Display:** 17.3" Full HD, 1920 x 1080, IPS, LED, anti-glare
- **Touchscreen:** No
- **Graphics:** Intel Iris Xe integrated graphics
- **Wireless:** Wi-Fi 6, Bluetooth
- **Ports:** 1 HDMI 1.4, 1 USB-A 3.0, 2 USB-C 3.0, headphone jack
- **Camera:** 720p front camera with built-in mic
- **Battery life:** Up to 10 hours
- **Weight:** 4.6 lb
- **Color:** Natural Silver
- **Certifications:** ENERGY STAR, EPEAT Gold
- **Warranty:** 1 year parts and labor

It has a **4.7-star rating with 509 reviews** on Best Buy.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Searching Best Buy for matching laptop: await page.locator('e9').fill('HP FHD laptop 16GB RAM core i7 Windows 11');
Searching Best Buy for matching laptop: await page.locator('e10').click();
Sorting by Best Selling: await page.locator('e224').click();
Opening top organic best-selling match: await page.locator('e265').click();
Showing similar specs too: await page.locator('e203').click();

screenshots.title: Searching Best Buy for matching laptop
